name: @stream-screen/host
description: StreamScreen host agent — Electron app for Windows that captures the screen via desktopCapturer and injects remote input via nut.js. Always free, no time limits, no bitrate caps.
author: divyamohan1993 <divyamohan1993@gmail.com>

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-assets.mjs && node scripts/bundle.mjs
